text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
"The race between Bono and Biko at the Sprinters
S. was blazing hot!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
"Bono was absolutely towering and Biko looked
so petite, but the way they both ran their hearts
out really moved me!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
"There's nothing like racing. I'm on the edge of
my seat just thinking about today's race. Go get
'em!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Everyone left so many nice comments, and
they're all rooting for me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I took a little peek outside just a minute ago, and
I saw how many people came to cheer me on.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
My heart just filled with happiness when I saw the
packed stands! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono and Biko Pegasus's battle in the
Sprinters S. has been the talk of the town, and
their rematch has drawn fans from far and wide.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I'm gonna put my 110% into this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! I nearly forgot, but here, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono rummages around for something,
then holds out a multi-tiered box to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I made lunch for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inside the box are sushi rolls, rice stuffed in sweet
tofu skins, rolled omelets, sausages, salad, fried
shrimp, fried chicken, and stewed veggies. It's a
veritable rainbow of food!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
When I was little, my mom and dad would pack a
big lunch for me when we had sports day at
school.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I remembered how happy I was when I ate it and
how much it motivated me to keep going!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to eat with everyone before the
race, so we can all get ready to run our best out
there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hold on, I'll go get Biko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's just about to take off, but I hurriedly stop
her.
choice_data_list: How about we eat it for dinner?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why?
choice_data_list: It's not good to eat a lot before a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's also the fact that she just finished a
massive lunch earlier, but I don't say that part
aloud.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Haha! I forgot!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All right! Dinner's gonna be so fun tonight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The beautifully packed lunch which she's filled to
the brim with food is proof of just how excited
she is to get out on the racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I wrap up the box and pray for her victory.
